title: Formation-Flying Telescope Constellation: Uniform 3D Baseline Coverage
strategies: diagonal / single-line placement: all apertures on the cube's main diagonal (matches the checker baseline, high 3D star discrepancy) -> ~0.1
3D Hammersley / Halton set: coord0 = (i+0.5)/n, coord1 = radical inverse base 2, coord2 = radical inverse base 3 (a reliable low-discrepancy construction that beats the diagonal)

best rank-1 Korobov lattice: sweep the generator g and place points ((i*[1,g,g^2 mod n] + 0.5)/n mod 1); keep the g with minimum EXACT 3D star discrepancy (a genuine search that beats a single fixed construction)
jittered/stratified cube grids, Fibonacci-type lattices, or local-search coordinate perturbation of a good seed set
